text_block_list.name: Mother with Baby
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh! It's Kitasan Black! U-u-um, I'm a huge
fan of yours!

text_block_list.name: Mother with Baby
text_block_list.text:
Erm, if it's not too much trouble... Do you think
you could sing a measure or two of a song for
me? I just love how your voice sounds!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Haha, no problem! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! I didn't mean to sing that loudly! I-I'm
sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black tries desperately to soothe the
baby, all the while feeling terrible for making
them cry.
